title: salix × pendulifolia
intro: Salix × pendulifolia is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Salix alba (white willow) and Salix purpurea (purple willow). The medicinal properties of Salix × pendulifolia are attributed to its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, and has anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Salix × pendulifolia include reducing pain, fever, and inflammation, as well as treating rheumatism and other conditions. Herbal preparations of Salix × pendulifolia can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
